text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the Fan Fest, where Tracen Academy
opens its doors to fans, holding a variety of
events to bring them closer to the racers they
support.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Because of her overall proficiency at sports,
Winning Ticket has been chosen to compete on
the volleyball team.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm the libero! It's got me sooo anxious!
choice_data_list: That means you're playing defense, right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yep! It's a really important position where you've
gotta be ready to receive the ball no matter
where it goes!

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's Tickezo! You're on the volleyball team,
right?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah! Are you a fan of mine? Yeah, that's right!

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fan A
text_block_list.text: Wow, how fun! I'll come cheer for you!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hehe, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Man, yeah—if my fans are gonna be watching, I
gotta make this the best match ever!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Let's have a GREAT game!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At last, the volleyball match begins!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket darts all over the court,
contributing a great deal to the team's efforts.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Don't even think about iiit!

text_block_list.name: Teammate
text_block_list.text: Nice save, Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The heated match gets to the point where
Ticket's team will win if they score one more
point.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay, this is it!

text_block_list.name: Teammate
text_block_list.text: Stay focused, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A long rally ensues, with neither team giving the
other an opening... until the opposing team
launches a decisive attack.

text_block_list.name: Teammate
text_block_list.text: Come on, Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Argh... We lost the game...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: If only I'd made that save, we could've won!

text_block_list.name: Teammate
text_block_list.text:
It's a team sport, so it's not your fault, Ticket! If
anything, you were a huge help!

text_block_list.name: Teammate
text_block_list.text:
Plus, your enthusiasm rubbed off and pumped us
up too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Awww! You guys are the nicest teammates ever!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu! Sob!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she lost her match, it seems like it
turned out to be a day to remember.

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fan A
text_block_list.text: Keep it up, Tickezo!

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fan B
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! You can win this!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ah! My fans!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A long rally ensues, with neither team giving the
other an opening... until the opposing team
launches a decisive attack.

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fans
text_block_list.text: Get it, Tickezo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We did it! We won!

text_block_list.name: Ticket Fans
text_block_list.text: Whoooaa!

text_block_list.name: Teammate
text_block_list.text:
You're today's MVP, Ticket! That was one heck of
a save you made!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh! I could hear my fans cheering, so I had
to make sure I got it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing Ticket's huge smile, the audience responds
with a big round of applause.
